title: Institution Rankings
description: Ranked list of research institutions based on their artifact evaluation contributions and AE committee service. Generated by generate_institution_rankings.py.

InstitutionRanking.title: Institution Ranking
InstitutionRanking.description: Ranking entry for a single institution aggregating artifact and AE service metrics.

combined_score.description: Total score combining artifact_score, citation_score, and ae_score. Minimum threshold of 3 for inclusion.

artifact_score.description: Points from artifact contributions (artifacts weighted by badge count).

artifact_citations.description: Total citation count for artifacts. Optional; present when citation tracking is enabled.

citation_score.description: Points from citations. Optional; present when citation tracking is enabled.

ae_score.description: Points from AE committee memberships (3 pts each) and chair roles (+2 pts each).

ae_ratio.description: Artifact-to-evaluation ratio (artifact_score / ae_score). Null when ae_score is 0.

role.description: Classification based on A:E ratio: 'Producer' (high artifact, low AE), 'Consumer' (low artifact, high AE), or 'Balanced'.

artifacts.description: Total number of artifacts produced by this institution.

badges_functional.description: Count of functional badges across all artifacts.

badges_reproducible.description: Count of reproduced/replicated badges across all artifacts.

ae_memberships.description: Number of AE committee memberships held by authors from this institution.

chair_count.description: Number of AE chair roles held by authors from this institution.

total_papers.description: Total DBLP paper count at tracked conferences.

artifact_rate.description: Percentage of papers with artifacts (artifacts / total_papers * 100).

num_authors.description: Count of unique authors affiliated with this institution.

conferences.description: List of conferences where the institution has contributions.

years.description: Mapping of year (as string) to activity count.

top_authors.description: Top 20 authors from this institution, sorted by combined_score.

TopAuthor.title: Top Author
TopAuthor.description: Summary of a top-contributing author within an institution.

name.description: Author name (may include DBLP disambiguation suffix like '0001').
